activities.name: India International Science Festival (IISF 2022)
activities.description:
We participated in the India International Science Festival 2022 held from 21–24 January 2023 at Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal. The festival included a large Startup Expo where selected startups from different institutes and organizations across India showcased their technologies.

At the expo, we exhibited Bhoomicam at our booth and demonstrated the platform to visitors, researchers, and industry representatives.

The event was part of India’s G20 presidency celebrations and the Azadi Ka Amrit Mahotsav.

With: Tushar Bharadwaj

activities.name: Surveying–Geomatics Karyashala 2023
activities.description:
I served as the primary coordinator for the "Hands-on Training on Advance Surveying Instruments" (Karyashala), a national-level workshop organized by Prof. Siddhartha Khare from 1-11 January 2023.

I was responsible for the end-to-end execution of the 11-day program, managing 25+ selected researchers from across India.

I assisted instructors during practical sessions and guided participants in field demonstrations using instruments such as Total Station, Digital Level, GNSS/GPS receivers, Terrestrial Laser Scanner, and UAV/drone-based photogrammetry systems.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare, Tushar Bharadwaj

activities.name: UG Civil Survey Camp 2022
activities.description:
From 27-Nov to 10-Dec-2022, I volunteered in the annual Survey Camp conducted by the Geospatial Division, Civil Engg. Dept., IIT Roorkee. This year under the supervision of Prof. Saurabh Vijay and Prof. Siddhartha Khare. The camp was held at Chandi Ghat, Haridwar, where 2nd year UG students carried out practical field surveying exercises.

It was more than 125 hours of survey with Total Station, GPS, Drone and Satellite Remote Sensing Data.

During the two-week camp, I helped coordinate and guide 180+ UG and PG students in field activities such as measurements, data collection, and spatial mapping.

With: Prof. Saurabh Vijay, Prof. Siddhartha Khare, Prashant Singh and Volunteering TAs

activities.name: AABTonics 2022 - National Geospatial Startup Competition
activities.description:
We participated in AABTonics 2022, a GIS startup competition organized by AABSyS IT Pvt. Ltd.

We presented the startup idea regarding a geospatial and data-driven solution on improving agricultural monitoring and decision-making using spatial technologies.

Our startup was awarded **1st Prize** and received a cash award of **₹50,000** on 16 Nov 2022 (International GIS Day).

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare, Tushar Bharadwaj

activities.name: 175th Foundation Day of IIT Roorkee
activities.description:
We showcased our startup, BhoomiCam, at the Startup Expo 2022, organized during the historic 175th Foundation Day celebrations of IIT Roorkee.

During the celebration, a commemorative coin and postal stamp were also released to mark 175 years of IIT Roorkee.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare

activities.name: Outreach Program by Krishi Vibhag
activities.description:
I participated in an outreach program organized by Krishi Vigyan Kendra Dhanauri (Haridwar) where we visited several villages in and around Roorkee to interact directly with farmers and rural communities.

Prof. Siddhartha Khare presented and promoted Bhoomicam, explaining how drone-based services, satellite insights, and AI-driven tools can help farmers in crop monitoring, spraying, and better field management.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare, Mr. Umesh Saxena

activities.name: World Environment Day Program at KVK
activities.description:
We took part in an outreach and awareness program organized at Krishi Vigyan Kendra Dhanauri, Roorkee (Haridwar) on the occasion of World Environment Day (05-Jun-2023). The event brought together students and scientists from agricultural domain, and local farmers to discuss environmental responsibility in agriculture and the role of modern technologies in sustainable farming.

During the program, a plantation (*Vriksha Ropan*) activity was organized as a symbolic and practical step toward environmental conservation.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare, Mr. Umesh Saxena, Tushar Bharadwaj

activities.name: National Agri-Startup Conclave 2023
activities.description:
I participated in the National Agri-Startup Conclave 2023 organized at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, Uttarakhand under the IDP-NAHEP program.
The event provided a platform for startups to present their solutions, exchange ideas, and interact with students and experts working towards advancing agricultural innovation in India.

During the event with my supervisor Prof. Siddhartha Khare, we represented Bhoomicam and presented our technology platform focused on integrating drone & satellite insights. And discussed how such technologies can help farmers improve crop monitoring, optimize resource use, and make more informed decisions for farm management.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare, Prof. Saurabh Vijay

activities.name: PhenoCam Installation at KVK
activities.description:
We deployed a CCFC PhenoCam integrated with meteorological sensors to track the crop phenology.

The PhenoMet station was installed at the experimental farm with rice-wheat rotational cropping.

The camera was mounted on a tower at a height of approximately 6.5 meters and fixed in a north-facing direction to reduce the influence of direct sunlight.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare, Tushar Bharadwaj, Shreyas Goswami, Apurwa Chaurasia, Sivani and Peeyush.

activities.name: Faridabad Mela Mahotsav 2023
activities.description:
I represented Bhoomicam at the Faridabad Mela Mahotsav held at Surajkund, Faridabad from 21-24 Dec 2023. The Mahotsav is a large cultural fair that brings together people from different regions to celebrate their heritage, traditions, and community activities.

During the event, I presented our startup's agricultural technology platform, which integrates drone services, satellite insights, and AI-based tools to support farmers in precision agriculture.

With: Peeyush Jasaiwal

activities.name: Research Day - Startup Expo 2024
activities.description:
Participated in Institute Research Day 2024 at IIT Roorkee on 14 March 2024. The event celebrates research and innovation across the institute and coincides with Pi Day and the birthday of Albert Einstein. Research groups, students, and startups showcased their work through posters, demonstrations, and exhibition stalls.

During the event, we presented our startup Bhoomicam at the exhibition area and interacted with faculty members, researchers, and students from different departments

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare, Shreyas Goswami, Apurwa Chaurasia, and Sivani.

activities.name: TIPS 4.0 – Technology Innovation at IIT Bombay
activities.description:
I attended the TIPS 4.0 – Technology Innovation in Cyber-Physical Systems held at IIT Bombay on 13–14 May 2024. The event was organised by the Technology Innovation Hub (TIH-IoT).

We attended the event to represent the BhoomiCam startup. It was a good opportunity to present, interact with startups and explore collaborations. During the event, around 40+ deep-tech startups showcased their technologies, and pitched their ideas to VCs and investors.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare and Shreyas Goswami

activities.name: Startup Day 2024 by TIDES IIT Roorkee
activities.description:
On 20 July 2024, I attended Startup Day 2024 organised by TIDES, IIT Roorkee. The program focused on showcasing startups, sharing experiences from entrepreneurs, and creating interaction between early-stage founders and the startup ecosystem around IIT Roorkee.

During Startup Day, we discussed with Mr. Amit Sinha, ADG, Uttarakhand Police and other defense officers regarding the possible solutions related to geospatial tracking and monitoring of sensitive areas.

With: Shreyas Goswami

activities.name: RuTAGe Smart Village Centre
activities.description:
The RuTAGe Smart Village Centre (RSVC) was inaugurated on 10 September 2024 at Khoont village, Almora, the birthplace of Govind Ballabh Pant. The centre was set up by IIT Roorkee, with collaboration from Nehir Himalayan Sansthan and other local partners.

RuTAGe works to take technologies developed in institutions like IITs and deploy them in rural areas. At the centre, several were demonstrated, such as a solar-assisted Bageshwari wool charkha, a cooled vegetable vending cart, pico-hydro based cold storage, and a mechanised felt-making device etc.

With: Dr. Neeraj Pant and Geetu Saini

activities.name: NASA Space Apps Challenge 2024
activities.description:
We participated in the 2024 NASA International Space Apps Challenge on 5–6 October 2024.

We have developed a web tool to access Landsat-8/9 data, which allows users to enter coordinates and quickly get future satellite pass time and pixel reflectance values, which is useful for comparing ground observations with satellite imagery.

We received the "Galactic Problem Solver" certificate from NASA.

With: Shreyas Goswami, Amarjeet Kumar Mahato, Nitin Lodhi

activities.name: NASSCOM Technology Confluence 2024
activities.description:
I attended the NASSCOM Technology Confluence 2024 at Chandigarh on 12 Nov 2024. It was a good opportunity to interact with entrepreneurs and researchers, and to discuss how technologies like remote sensing and data analytics can support practical solutions in agriculture.

I participated as a representative of IIT Roorkee and also showcased the work of BhoomiCam, an agri-tech startup led by Prof. Siddhartha Khare.

With: Prof. Vivek Kumar Malik and Shreyas Goswami

activities.name: IEEE InGARSS Conference
activities.description:
I attended the IEEE InGARSS 2024 conference held at the National Institute of Technology (NIT) Goa. During the conference, I had the opportunity to present a part of my PhD research, where I shared my work and received useful feedback from researchers and participants working in the field of geoscience and remote sensing.

It was a good experience to interact with fellow researchers, and to connect with students and scientists from different institutions working on similar problems.

With: Colleagues from Geospatial, IITR

activities.name: PhenoCam Site Selection at Kashmir
activities.description:
We visited Kashmir for selecting suitable sites for installing PhenoCam. During the visit, we went to the University of Kashmir and met Prof. Rayees Malik and Prof. Manzoor Shah from the Department of Botany. We discussed possible locations and collaboration for setting up the cameras to monitor vegetation phenology.

As part of the visit, we also travelled to Gulmarg in Baramulla district, Jammu and Kashmir to visit the High Altitude Research Field Station.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare

activities.name: Operation Dronagiri Program
activities.description:
Our Startup Bhoomicam has been selected among the **TOP 25** startups in India from over 750+ applications received under the Operation Dronagiri program, organized by Ministry of Science and Technology.

Bhoomicam has been awarded a **₹10 Lakh funding grant** under the National Geospatial Startup Challenge.

As part of this, Bhoomicam will collaborate with local administrative bodies across five districts to deploy its geospatial solutions.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare

activities.name: Drone Tech Expo at Dehradun
activities.description:
Represented IIT Roorkee's Drone Lab and Bhoomicam in Surya Drone Tech at Dehradun organised by the Central Command of the Indian Army. The exhibition is showcasing state-of-the-art drone technologies developed in the country as well as the application, which are tailored to multi-dimensional military requirements.

With: Sahil Kundal

activities.name: Geospatial Mapathon 2025 (Edition V)
activities.description:
We participated in the FOSSEE Geospatial Mapathon 2025 from 15 March 2025 to 20 July 2025 and were recognized as **winners** in this open-source mapping challenge.

Our project focused on **mapping forest fires caused by Jhum cultivation in Mizoram**. We used open-source QGIS software and satellite data from the Bhuvan portal to analyze how this traditional farming practice impacts the environment.

We were able to identify areas with high deforestation and frequent seasonal fires.

With: Shreyas Goswami, Ishfaqul Haque, Akash A.

activities.name: Soil Moisture Sensors at Jaisalmer
activities.description:
Visited Jaisalmer (18-29 Aug 2025) to install soil moisture sensors at 28 different locations across arid field sites. This field campaign was part of an ongoing project of Bhoomicam to evaluate the performance of a biofertilizer that claims to improve soil moisture retention under dry sandy soil conditions.

All sensors were calibrated and geo-tagged for spatial tracking and long-term monitoring.

With: Sushmit Srivastava

activities.name: Plantation Health Assessment at NTPC
activities.description:
Conducted a detailed plantation health assessment of the 108-hectare green belt at NTPC Solapur using multispectral UAV (Trinity F90+) data. The objective was to evaluate individual tree health across the entire industrial campus.

With: Gaurav Singh Bareth

activities.name: NTRO AI Grand Challenge
activities.description:
Our startup **Bhoomicam**, led by Prof. Siddhartha Khare, has been selected among the **TOP 6 startups nationwide** for Stage 2 of the NCIIPC Startup India AI Grand Challenge 2025.

PS 10: Change Detection in Satellite Imagery

As part of this national recognition, Bhoomicam has received a **₹3 lakh prize** and a **₹5 lakh development grant**.

With: Shreyas Goswami

activities.name: GeoSmart India Conference
activities.description:
Presented my PhD research at GeoSmart India 2025, one of Asia's premier geospatial conferences.

I had the opportunity to network and share insights on vegetation phenology monitoring using multi-sensor approaches with my collegues from Shiv Nadar University - Dr. Ghanshyam Giri, Manoj Yadav, Apoorva Yadav and junior from MANIT, Bhopal - Pournima.

 With: My supervisor -  Prof. Siddhartha Khare

activities.name: 100 Startups, 100 Days at IIT Ropar
activities.description:
Attended the AI Impact Pre-Summit (#100Startups100Days) organized by iHub-AWaDH at IIT Ropar. Our startup **Bhoomicam Private Limited** was awarded a grant support of ₹2 Lakhs.

We also had the privilege of meeting **Prof. HC Verma**, a renowned physicist and a great teacher who made physics interesting in our school times with his books.

With: Prof. Siddhartha Khare

activities.name: NRSC Offline Coding Challenge 2025
activities.description:
We participated in the NRSC Offline EO Data Processing Challenge from 03 June 2025 to 06 July 2025. Our aim was to develop an automated cloud and shadow masking model for Resourcesat-2/2A LISS-IV satellite images using open-source tools.

We were awarded **Second Winner** in the competition and received certificates along with a scale model of LVM3 as a memento.

With: Shreyas Goswami, Isfaqul Haque, Akash A.

activities.name: PhenoMet Installation at Almora
activities.description:
First visited Almora on 30–31 Jan 2026 for site selection in pine and oak dominated forest. Returned again on 14–22 Feb 2026 to install a CCFC PhenoCam with meteorological sensors — PAR, wind, soil moisture, relative humidity, temperature, precipitation, etc.

During our visit, we also observed early Rhododendron flowering that typically expected in April–May; and included the tree in our camera's field of view.

With: Suyash Khare & Gaurav Singh Bareth
